recommendation.title: Full rest — TSB well past the -25 line at -31.7
recommendation.reasoning: TSB is -31.7 — past the -25 'swap to easy' threshold, not just the -15 caution line. This is worse than earlier estimates: a data bug meant heart rate for tracked sessions was being read from the wrong 2-hour window, understating effort across the board (today's own run averaged 153bpm, not the 52bpm first recorded — a real, not easy, effort despite being at the right pace). Once corrected, this week's true training load (including Jul 4's ~8.5h effort and Jul 6's full swim-plus-commute day) is substantially higher than first reported. HRV is 61ms, 8% below your 66ms baseline — mild. Sleep was excellent (score 92) and resting HR is normal (43bpm). Tomorrow is already a scheduled rest day — with TSB this negative, that's the right call and arguably not enough on its own; expect Thursday's easy run to still feel heavy.
recommendation.sessionDetail: No training scheduled. Optional light walk or mobility work if you want to move, nothing structured.
recommendation.bikeNote: Easy bike both ways is fine — no session tomorrow, no reason to preserve legs.
